meta.description: Jarvis Brain — master index of all work, ideas, and creations

entries.title: Gemma 3 Homebrew Formula — Metal GPU + Chat UI
entries.summary: Homebrew formula that installs Google Gemma 3 locally on macOS with Metal GPU acceleration via Ollama. Embeds a Python interactive chat UI with model-size picker, coloured output, slash commands (/help /model /clear /save /quit), readline history, and conversation save-to-file.
entries.notes: HEAD-only formula. Install: brew install --HEAD lordhammer11/tap/gemma3. Metal is auto-enabled on Apple Silicon via Ollama.

entries.title: Apex Agent Homebrew Formula
entries.summary: Existing Homebrew formula for Apex Agent in the tap.
entries.notes: Pre-existing formula — not modified in current sprint.

entries.title: Claude Skills Library (235+ skills)
entries.summary: 235+ production-ready skills across 9 domains: engineering, marketing, C-level advisory, product, project management, RA/QM, business growth, finance. Supports Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code/Copilot, Goose, Gemini CLI, Codex, OpenClaw.
entries.notes: See INSTALLATION.md for per-agent install commands.

entries.title: Jarvis Brain — persistent knowledge index
entries.summary: Central knowledge brain tracking all work, ideas, and creations across every repo. Includes index.json, per-entry files, BRAIN.md human-readable dashboard, /brain Claude Code slash command, brain_update.py script, and GitHub Actions daily sync workflow.
entries.notes: Query with /brain in Claude Code. Auto-syncs daily via GitHub Actions.

entries.title: HaMm3rOS iOS App
entries.summary: SwiftUI iOS app (iPhone + iPad, iOS 16+) serving as the HaMm3rOS mobile command centre. 5 tabs: Dashboard, Brain (searchable Jarvis Brain entries), Gemma (local AI chat via Ollama), Ideas, Settings. Full context persistence: chat history survives kill/relaunch, brain cached offline with 1h TTL, tab state via @SceneStorage.
entries.notes: Open HaMm3rOS.swiftpm in Swift Playgrounds on iPhone or iPad — signs automatically with your Apple ID. Set Ollama host to your Mac's local IP in Settings for Gemma chat.

ideas.title: Native macOS SwiftUI app for Gemma 3
ideas.description: A native macOS SwiftUI wrapper around the gemma3 CLI for a polished app-store-style experience.

ideas.title: Web dashboard for the Jarvis brain
ideas.description: A GitHub Pages site that renders brain/index.json as a visual knowledge map — timeline, tag cloud, repo graph.
